name: @forwardimpact/svcmap
description: Activity reads and writes over gRPC — the agent-facing gateway to Map's activity database.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Building an agent feature that reads or writes activity data and realizing the agent would need direct DB access.
jobs.bigHire: read and write activity data from any agent without leaking schema or credentials.
jobs.littleHire: fetch unscored artifacts or write evidence rows without touching Supabase directly.
jobs.competesWith: opening Supabase directly from the agent; building per-product activity endpoints; embedding query logic in the evaluation skill
